1. Multi-Metabolite Signatures of exposure
Multi-Metabolite Signatures of exposure
  • Hello!
  • Scientific context and scope
    • Metabolomics in nutritional epidemiology
      • Exposure biomarkers
      • Diet and disease research
      • Precision nutrition
    • Multi-metabolite signatures
      • Advantages over single metabolites
    • Methodological landscape for MMS construction
      • Penalized regression
        • LASSO
        • Elastic Net
        • Ridge Regression
      • Dimension reduction
        • PCA
        • PLS / PLS-DA
        • Machine learning
          • Random forest
          • Gradient boosting
          • Support vector machines
      • Scoring frameworks
        • Weighted scores
        • Metabolite risk scores
        • Index construction
        • Reporting and reproducibility expectations
  • Analytical workflow
    • Data import and preprocessing
      • Data structure
      • Metabolomics platform
      • Exposure variables
      • Outcome definitions
      • Missing value handling
      • Normalization
      • Transformation (log scaling)
      • Batch correction
      • Scaling (z-score)
    • Study design & sample splitting
      • Training vs test dataset
      • Cross-validation
      • Internal validation
      • Avoiding overfitting
    • Building the MMS
      • Feature selection
      • Model training
      • Score construction
      • LASSO metabolite selection
      • Elastic net models
      • Weighted metabolite scores
    • Model evaluation
      • R2
      • RMSE
      • ROC / AUC
      • Calibration
      • Permutation testing
      • Cross-validation results
    • Robustness and reproducibility
      • Sensitivity analyses
      • Stability of metabolite selection
      • Reproducibility across folds
